action_set_definitions.name: get_greenhouse_status
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current telemetry from the greenhouse sensors, including moisture, water tank levels, ambient conditions, and plant stress.

action_set_definitions.name: set_pump_state
action_set_definitions.description: Turns the irrigation pump ON or OFF to manage soil moisture levels.

state.description: The desired state of the pump.

action_set_definitions.name: set_ventilation_state
action_set_definitions.description: Controls the greenhouse cooling and ventilation system to reduce ambient temperature and mitigate plant stress.

state.description: The desired state of the ventilation/cooling system.

action_set_definitions.name: refill_water_tank
action_set_definitions.description: Adds water to the main reservoir to ensure the tank level stays above the conservation limit.

amount_liters.description: The volume of water to add to the reservoir.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_time
action_set_definitions.description: Simulates the passage of time to allow the environment to react to actions like irrigation or cooling.

minutes.description: The number of minutes to wait.

state_description.soil_moisture_percentage: Current average soil moisture level across greenhouse zones (0-100).
state_description.water_tank_level_liters: Current volume of water available in the main reservoir.
state_description.ambient_temperature_celsius: The current air temperature inside the greenhouse.
state_description.ambient_humidity_percentage: The current relative humidity of the greenhouse air.
state_description.pump_active_status: Indicates if the irrigation pump is currently running.
state_description.plant_stress_index: A metric (0.0 to 1.0) representing plant health; increases if moisture is too low or temperature too high.
